folio.label: 182v
folio.l: ¢ Whan Onedake was ded , she mygútily
The Regnes helde , & w hire ¸pre honde
Ageyns hire foos , she faugút so cruelly
That there nas kyngö , ne Pénce , in al æ lond
That he nas glad , if he æ grace fond
That she ne wolde , vp on his land verreye
Witú hire they made , alliaunce , by bonde
To ben in pees , and lete hire ride & pleye
¢ The Em¹our of Rome , Claudyus
Ne hi~ biforn~ , the Romayn Galien
Ne dursten neuäe , ben so corageous
Ne noon Ermyn , ne noon Egipcien
Ne Surrien , ne no~no~ Arrabien
W Inne the feldes , æ durst w hire figút
Leest æ she wolde he~ , w hire handes slen
Or w hire meyne , putten he~ to fligút
¢ In kynges habite , wente hire sones two
As Eyres , of here fadres Regnes alle
And Heremanno , and Thymalao
Here names were , as Persiens he~ calle
But ay fortune hatú , in hire hony , galle
This mygúty Quene , may no while endure
Fortune , out of hire regne , mad hire falle
To wrecchednesse , and to mysauenture
¢ Aurelian , whan that the gouänance
Of Rome , come in to handes tweye
He shope vp on this Quene , to do vengeaunce
And w hise legions , he toke his weye
Toward Cenobie , & shortly for to seye
He mad hire flee , and atte laste hire hente
And fettred hire , and eke hire children tweye
And wan the lond , & home to Rome he wente
¢ Amonges othere thynges , æ he wan
Hire Char , that was , w gold wrougút , & perre
This gret Romayn , this Aurelian
Hatú w hi~ ladde , for æ men shulde it se
Biforn~ his Triumphe , walketú she
W gilt cheynes , on hire nekke hangynge
Corovned was she , as after hire degree
And ful of Perre , charged hire clothynge
¢ Allas fortune , she that whilom was
Dredful to kynges , and to Em¹oures
Now gauretú al the peeple , on hire , allas
And she æ helmed was , in stark Stoures
